Name: Modern Exchange Salalah An Nahdah
About: Modern Exchange is the leading Remittance and Money Exchange Co. in Oman. We were founded in 1993 and are regulated by the Central Bank of Oman. We became the part of Al Mulla Group (www.almullagroup.com), Kuwait after acquisition in 2011, and are led by the strong values of integrity, transparency and trust.
